title: T-065 — Docs: TEC-025 BOM Snapshots Viewer prototype gap brief
prompt: Write engineering brief for missing TEC-025 'BOM Snapshots Viewer' prototype per §7.5 [NO-PROTOTYPE-YET]. Output: design/specs/TEC-025-bom-snapshots-viewer.md describing list of immutable snapshots per WO + JSON-diff viewer modal. Document that snapshots are read-only and live in bom_snapshots (T-002 + T-025). Until prototype lands, the implementation T3-ui task is OUT OF SCOPE for Phase 1.

pipeline_inputs.description: Brief documenting the snapshots viewer UX contract for future prototype work.
pipeline_inputs.details: Cover: list filterable by WO + immutability badge; diff modal between snapshot and current BOM; rule: never allow edit. Reuse the diff renderer from T-040.
acceptance_criteria: Given the brief, when reviewed, then it specifies list filters, immutability rules, and diff-modal contract.
Given the brief, when read by a designer, then they can produce a labelled prototype that matches the contract.
risk_red_lines: Do not propose any edit affordance for snapshots.
